---
title: "CV"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

You can summarize your background here and optionally add a PDF link once you have one in the repository.

### Education

- PhD in Your Field, University Name, Expected Year
- Previous degree, Institution, Year

### Academic Positions

- Role, Department or Lab, Dates

### Awards and Honors

- Award name, Year

### Teaching

- Course or teaching role, Term

### Service

- Reviewer, committee, or outreach activity
